chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No.S-53 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on M.A No. 482/ 2026 17-03-2026. Mr. Shah Nawaz Kunbhar advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, A.A.G. = Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that in compliance to the last date’s Order, report in “C” class has been submitted by the police before the learned trial Court, where matter is also fixed today for Order. In view of above, instant Contempt Application (M.A No.482/ 2026) stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE *Saleem* 2
